title: No warning is given when a latch is inferred in an always_comb procedure

features.name: always_comb with incomplete if branch coverage
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with an if statement where not all branches assign to all outputs, causing latch inference
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
  if((codepoint == 21'h2020)) begin
      bytes = ({24'h0,(reg_val & 8'hff)});
  end
end

features.name: conditional assignment to output in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where outputs are assigned only under specific conditions, with no else clause to cover all paths
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
  if(condition) begin
      out = value;
  end
end

features.name: multiple assignments to same signal in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with multiple assignments to the same signal across different conditional branches, where some branches do not assign to the signal
